## Release Gate Tracking (required for release/launch PRs)

## Required Gate Sequence (release/launch PRs)
- [ ] `CI / Build, Typecheck & Test`
- [ ] `CI / Coverage Gates`
- [ ] `PR Check / Lint & Typecheck`
- [ ] `PR Check / Circular Dependency Check`
- [ ] `Secret Scan / Gitleaks Scan`
